falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5000 (key resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would confirm a bullish trend continuation, falsifying the HOLD signal which implies indecision or consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The macro engine's phase transitions to 'confirmed bullish' within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed bullish phase would directly contradict the current UNKNOWN/ HOLD status, proving the verdict incorrect through explicit phase validation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
